description_long: This computer monitor features a wide, rectangular display with a dual-panel design, each side showcasing vibrant, artistic graphics. The front face is dominated by the screen area, bordered by a slim, matte black bezel that separates the two display sections. The rear and side views reveal a relatively thin profile, with a solid, dark casing and no visible stand, suggesting it may be wall-mounted or integrated into a larger structure. The bottom edge of the monitor appears to have a subtle lip, but no physical buttons or ports are visible from any angle. The back of the monitor is plain, with no branding or decorative elements, and the overall construction suggests a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with possible internal metal reinforcement for structural integrity.
description: A wide, dual-panel computer monitor with vibrant graphics, slim black bezel, and a minimalist, modern design. No visible stand, buttons, or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual-panel display with colorful graphics and a slim black bezel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monitor's thin profile and solid, dark casing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark back with no visible branding or ports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the thin profile and solid casing seen in view 1.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, with a subtle divider between the two display panels. It has a flat, modern appearance with no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: No stand is visible; the monitor appears to be designed for wall-mounting or integration.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or surface.
